calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order To Discurse Proceeds Of Sale; Referee'S Final Report Of Sale And Request For Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Disburse Proceeds of Sale of Real Property Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Robert H. Peterson, III, Esq. for Plaintiffs.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants Judgment Directing Distrubution of Proceeds, Attorney's Fees and Costs in total of $9,279.24 as fully described in the proposed judgment signed in court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Text Ruling

Confirmation For Sale Of Real Property.
Off Calendar Mar-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Order Confirming Referee's Sales of Real Property this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Robert Peterson, III, Esq. for Plaintiffs.
The Court appointed referee: Timonthy Cannon present with Ass. Karin Bermillion.
Purchaser: Gene A. Farber present with Broker: Joe Linus of Franklin Financial Group.
No opposition was filed and no other overbidder present in court.
After hearing the Plaintiff's Motion and testimony of the appointed referee, proof being made to satisfaction of the Court, the Court grants the Order Confirming Referee's Sale of the subject real property to the purchaser.
Order signed in open court, see details in scanned doc.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. R. Edwards, CSR:Tony Vaughn.
Robert Peterson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Frank Gonzales, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants the motion. Mr. Peterson to call this department to set a motion to approve the sale of said property.
Interlocutory Judgment signed in open court.
